surfaces.label: Front
surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the FRONT of a buckslip (8.5" × 3.5" trim).

Canvas: 8.75" wide × 3.75" tall (includes 0.125" bleed on all sides).
Trim: 8.5" × 3.5" — everything outside this is cut off.
Safe zone: 8.25" × 3.25" (0.125" inset from trim) — ALL text and critical content must stay inside.

No restricted zones on the front — it is fully customizable.

Design tips:
- Buckslips are letter inserts — they go inside #10 envelopes with 8.5×11" letters.
- PDF format only (no HTML rendering).
- No merge variables — this is a static design.
- Extend background colors into the bleed to avoid white edges.
- Stock options: 80# Text or Cover, Gloss or Matte.
- Think of this as a small flyer or coupon insert.

surfaces.label: Back
surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the BACK of a buckslip (8.5" × 3.5" trim).

Canvas: 8.75" wide × 3.75" tall (includes 0.125" bleed on all sides).
Trim: 8.5" × 3.5".
Safe zone: 8.25" × 3.25" (0.125" inset from trim).

No restricted zones on the back — fully customizable.

Design tips:
- The back is often left blank or used for terms/conditions, a secondary offer, or additional branding.
- PDF format only. No merge variables.
- Extend backgrounds into bleed.

printSpecs.stock: 80# Text or Cover, Gloss or Matte

notes: Letter insert only — included with 8.5×11" letters via Campaigns API.
8.75" × 3.75" is the BLEED size — trim is 8.5" × 3.5".
